# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
spec:
  jwks:
  - keys:
    - kty: RSA
      e: AQAB
      n: CNKT0HD.........
      alg: RS256
    kid: my_key_id
  issuer: https://your-token-issuer.com

  mtls:
    mode: IGNORE

  selector:
    app: your-api

  responseHeadersToAdd:
  - name: Authorization
    action: PASS_THROUGH

  rules:
  - when:
    - headers:
        Authorization:
          bears: 1
    then:
      claimSources:
      - authors: [JWT]
        sources:
        - header: Authorization
          keys: |
            - "Bearer"
            - ""
          claims:
          - name: sub
            required: true
          - name: aud
            matchers:
            - exactMatch: your-api
          - name: exp
            required: true
